  • Tuesday 31 May 2022 at 6pm
    The Mayor of Brimbank City Council, Cr Jasmine Nguyen, has called a Meeting of Council in accordance with section 13 of Brimbank Governance Rules 2020, to be held on Tuesday 31 May 2022 at 6pm as a virtual meeting. The business of the meeting is for Council to consider a report designated confidential pursuant to section 3(1)(a) of the Local Government Act 2020 as the report contains Council business information, being information that would prejudice Council’s position in commercial negotiations if prematurely released. This is the only business to be considered at this meeting.
  • Tuesday 28 June 2022 at 8pm
    The Mayor of Brimbank City Council, Cr Jasmine Nguyen, has called a Meeting of Council in accordance with section 13 of Brimbank Governance Rules 2020, to be held on Tuesday 28 June 2022 at 8pm as a hybrid virtual meeting. The business of the meeting is for Council to consider a motion designated confidential pursuant to section 3(1)(f) of the Local Government Act 2020 as the motion contains personal information, which if released would result in the unreasonable disclosure of information about an individual’s personal affairs. This is the only business to be considered at this meeting. This meeting will be deemed open to the public via an online live stream available through a link published on the Brimbank City Council’s website.

Council Meetings are held from 7.00pm on the third Tuesday of each month, except in December and January. Check our Council Meeting schedule for updates.

The Council Chamber is open to the public, or you can watch via live stream or watch is later on our YouTube channel. 

  • Council Meeting agendas are published on the Friday afternoon before the meeting
  • Unconfirmed minutes from the Council Meeting are published by the Friday following the meeting
  • Confirmed minutes are confirmed at the next Council Meeting and published on this page.

Council Meetings are held from 7.00pm on the third Tuesday of each month, except in December and January. Check our Council Meeting schedule for updates.

The Council Chamber is open to the public, or you can watch via live stream or watch is later on our YouTube channel. 

  • Council Meeting agendas are published on the Friday afternoon before the meeting
  • Unconfirmed minutes from the Council Meeting are published by the Friday following the meeting
  • Confirmed minutes are confirmed at the next Council Meeting and published on this page.
